name: ExtensionSubstanceProtein_SequenceType
title: R5: The SubstanceProtein descriptive elements will only be used when a complete or partial amino acid sequence is available or derivable from a nucleic acid sequence (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubstanceProtein.sequenceType` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubstanceProtein.sequenceType` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `SubstanceProtein.sequenceType` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubstanceProtein.sequenceType` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubstanceProtein` is not mapped.
Element `SubstanceProtein.sequenceType` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
